name: BREAKPOINT: Viper Squad
short_description: A high-velocity sci-fi shooter built around charge management, explosive team fights, and Drivers who flip the match with their abilities.
detailed_description:
A high-velocity sci-fi FPS built for players who want precision gunplay, tactical depth, and clutch team moments.

Overload Mode

A signature risk-reward mechanic that defines the game’s identity. Build charge by staying in the fight and dealing damage. Higher charge means stronger abilities and boosted stats, but hit 100% and you detonate unless your squad stabilizes you. It’s tense, explosive, and forces smart timing every match.

Dual-Driver System

Each class has a pool of specialized abilities. Pick any two before a match and shape your build around your role. Drivers charge during combat, letting you pull off power plays, escapes, ambushes, or team saves. Every loadout feels different, and every match asks you to adapt.

Modes Built for High Stakes

Overload for chaotic energy management.

Team Deathmatch for pure mechanical skill.

Objective modes for coordinated squad play.

Custom matches for whatever ruleset you want.

Exoleague Progression

Climb six competitive ranks. Earn Ascension Points through kills, assists, and objectives. Your performance updates your rank after every match.

A Sci-Fi World in Crisis

Fight across space stations, neon ruins, and collapsing battlegrounds. Vertical layouts, reactive elements, and destructible cover force constant adaptation.

Customization Without Limits

Use any weapon on any character. Add attachments and gadgets to refine your build. Unlock cosmetics as you rise through the league.

Why It Stands Out

Tight shooting. Real strategic depth. Fast rounds with meaningful choices. Overload keeps every fight on the edge of chaos, and the Driver system lets you define how you play. Every match gives you a chance to make something big happen.
